members.name: Steve Ratchen
members.bio: Steve's powerful vocals are the heart of Winslow's sound. A seasoned performer with decades on stage, he channels the soaring range of Randy Meisner and Timothy B. Schmit  night after night.

members.name: Ernie Vitale
members.bio: Ernie brings precision and feel to every performance, capturing the signature guitar tones that define the Eagles' timeless catalog — from the crunch of 'Life in the Fast Lane' to the shimmer of 'Desperado.'

members.name: Jack Sharnikow
members.bio: Jack rounds out Winslow's guitar army with versatility and fire, handling a wide range of Eagles material with both technical skill and emotional authenticity.

members.name: Arnold Valentino
members.bio: Arnold's keyboard work fills the sonic landscape essential to the Eagles sound — from the grand piano chords of 'Hotel California' to the organ swells that define their greatest ballads.

members.name: Brian Clayton
members.bio: Brian drives the band with the precision and power of Don Henley's iconic drumming, while adding his own voice to Winslow's legendary 5-part harmonies.

members.name: Gary Oleyar
members.bio: Gary's dueling guitar work is a cornerstone of the Winslow live experience. His ability to recreate the layered harmonics of the Eagles' twin-guitar arrangements is nothing short of extraordinary.
